calendar.title: Project Solis — Internal Design Coordination
calendar.notes: KEY MEETING — Stantec internal design coord per May 15 agenda: Civil/Landscape, Arch/Structure, MEPFP breakout plan. Objective: confirm design deliverables before May 20-22 PF workshops. Huie OOO through May 20 — Renken should confirm MEPFP representation.

calendar.title: Chris Tinney — PTO
calendar.notes: Tinney OOO through May 20 — returns May 20 for PF workshops. Solis CD Bidder List (B1) and LOA (B1) can route to Spieler or hold for Tinney return May 20.

bucket1.subject: RE: Pacific Fusion || Action items for today / next week preparation
bucket1.thread_subject: Pacific Fusion Action Items / Next Week Prep
bucket1.body_preview: I have added requested subs to BC. See attached for revised sublist. I would like to start understanding what the interiors breakout cost is. We have a meeting on Tuesday...
bucket1.ai_summary: Henley sent revised sublist asking Ryan to weigh in on interiors cost breakout and confirm direction before PF workshops. 9 days no reply — CRITICAL. PF workshops May 20-22 are now 3 days out. This is the single highest-urgency action item entering the week.
bucket1.action: Weigh in on interiors cost breakout and workshop direction — must be done before May 20

bucket1.subject: FW: Project Solis CD Drawing bidder list
bucket1.thread_subject: Project Solis CD Drawing Bidder List
bucket1.body_preview: Can we indicate who is and is not prequalified with Clayco? This will be important to know as we move forward. Question — Are we really bidding out finishes at this stage?
bucket1.ai_summary: Tinney asked: flag prequalified vs non-prequalified subs on bidder list; confirm whether bidding finishes at CD stage. 9 days no reply — CRITICAL. Tinney returns from PTO May 20. Can route to Spieler now or address with Tinney Monday.
bucket1.action: Flag prequalified subs on bidder list; confirm finishes scope at CD stage — route to Spieler or hold for Tinney return May 20

bucket1.subject: RE: Solis — Settlement Memorializing Criteria and Understanding
bucket1.body_preview: Per our discussions, memorializing the agreed 3/8" settlement tolerance criteria for Solis foundation system. Want to confirm Clayco alignment before workshop week.
bucket1.ai_summary: NEW — Courtney Richardson (PF) sent late Saturday night memorializing the 3/8" settlement criteria for Solis foundation system. Needs Clayco written confirmation. PF workshops May 20-22 create urgency — this needs to be documented and confirmed before workshop week starts.
bucket1.action: Reply confirming Clayco alignment with 3/8" settlement criteria — written memorialization before May 20 workshops

bucket1.subject: RE: [External]Updated invitation: PNM & PF Syncs @ Thu May 14, 2026 9:30am - 10am (PDT)
bucket1.thread_subject: PNM & PF Syncs — Transformer Pad Design Standard
bucket1.body_preview: Please see the attached design standard for the Transformer Pad and the precast option. The relocation may be costly. Please advise how you'd like to proceed and when will construction start for the roadways mentioned.
bucket1.ai_summary: PNM attached transformer pad design standard and precast option. Warns relocation may be costly. Asking Ryan to advise on relocation approach and confirm road construction start timing. 3 days no reply. Cost impact unresolved — external party waiting.
bucket1.action: Advise PNM on transformer pad relocation approach; confirm road construction start timing

bucket1.subject: RE: Solis — Structural Preloading Conversation
bucket1.body_preview: Craig Streit (WGI) and Fang Fang (TT) coordinating on preloading before grade beam. Needs Ryan to confirm scope approach and sequence.
bucket1.ai_summary: PF coordinating preloading before grade beam with WGI and TT. Ryan must confirm preloading scope approach and sequence. 3 days waiting. Geopier kick-off already in progress per B3 thread — preloading sequence confirmation needed in parallel.
bucket1.action: Confirm preloading scope approach and sequence; coordinate with Craig Streit (WGI) and Fang Fang (TT)

bucket1.subject: RE: [EXTERNAL] Fwd: Clayco; Letter of Authorization
bucket1.body_preview: We'll also need to cover Chris Tinney.
bucket1.ai_summary: Abbott replied LOA must also cover Chris Tinney. 3 days no action. Tinney on PTO through May 20 — LOA can still be issued without his involvement. Clear path: update document, add Tinney's name, reissue to Abbott with invoice.
bucket1.action: Update LOA to include Tinney; reissue to Abbott with invoice — Tinney PTO does not block this

bucket1.subject: [EXTERNAL] RE: Baldwin + Clayco | PF Insurance Final Discussion - 5/6/2026
bucket1.thread_subject: Baldwin + Clayco | PF Insurance Final Discussion
bucket1.body_preview: All changes have been accepted. Added exhibit B. Please review and when you have accepted, I will get over to legal for contract inclusion. Next week I will send a concise list of what we'll need from Clayco on the OCIP marketing...
bucket1.ai_summary: Sarah sent final Exhibit B with all changes accepted. Awaiting Ryan's formal acceptance to route to legal. Conor Tighe confirmed OK on SDI language May 16 — path is clear. Thread closes once Ryan accepts. OCIP marketing checklist follows next week.
bucket1.action: Review Exhibit B; formally accept insurance terms — Tighe cleared SDI language May 16, this can close today

bucket2.subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] Pacific Fusion DS3 Structural Weekly
bucket2.body_preview: Bringing this back to the top of the lists. -Mark
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan sent May 8: carry $3.5M, asked cost/ton on steel and cost/SF on stainless plate. No reply from TT or PF in 9 days — CRITICAL. Follow-up has not been sent. This is the longest overdue B2 thread. Follow-up required immediately Monday morning.

bucket2.subject: RE: Pacific Fusion — Owner Cash Flow + Schedule
bucket2.body_preview: Team — please see attached revised cash flow and updated schedule for Pacific Fusion. Flagging key milestones and current cost position for your review ahead of workshop week.
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan sent revised PF cash flow + schedule to senior Clayco leadership (Abbott, Lienemann, Watkins, McGuire) on May 16. Thread reclassified from B3 to B2 — Ryan is now the sender awaiting leadership response. Related to DS3 leadership strategy thread. No response yet.

bucket2.subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] DS3 Infra - Leadership Discussion
bucket2.body_preview: ...into an initial progressive GMP and procure the early work scopes; with the context of the schedule based on all real inputs. I think this results in us sliding break ground...
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan sent strategic DS3 notes May 14: Keith's expectations, ~$50M savings breakdown, progressive GMP approach. Waiting on Conor and leadership. 3 days. PF Cash Flow thread (B2) is a parallel signal on the same leadership conversation.

bucket2.subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] Project Solis Elevation Study + Fire Protection Diagram
bucket2.thread_subject: Project Solis Elevation Study + Fire Protection
bucket2.body_preview: Thank you! Rebekah Bellum, AIA, NCARB, LEED AP BD+C Senior Architect...
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan followed up May 15 prompting Rebekah for elevation study + fire protection next steps. Follow-up sent. Waiting on Stantec. 2 days. May connect to Monday's Stantec design coord meeting — could resolve in the meeting.

bucket3.ai_summary: Active LJC/Gotion back-and-forth on BESS fire protection drawing comments. Gotion has 5 open items remaining. Appelbaum managing. Ryan oversight only.
Active LJC/Gotion design review. Substation cable spec (MV sizing) needs Gotion confirmation — Sineng procurement dependent. Appelbaum managing. Ryan oversight only.
TT uploaded foundation plan CAD files to ACC for WGI Geopier ground improvement kick-off. Progressing per plan. Related to B1 preloading thread — sequencing should align.

bucket3.ai_summary: Abbott forwarded BHM's acknowledgment of Clayco's Project Sun response. Early qualification stage. FYI tracking.
Stantec put VE forecast review on hold pending scope decisions. Ryan aware. No action until hold lifted.

bucket3.ai_summary: RTU/AHU reduction tradeoff analysis active. Renken handling. Thread progressing without further Ryan input needed.

Huie OOO through May 20-22 PF workshops. HVAC VE direction being handled by Renken/Stantec. FYI.
Accounting returning April travel expense document to Ryan and Tinney. Admin — review when time allows.
Wood forwarded internal design coord agenda. Meeting scheduled Monday May 18 1pm MDT. Calendar event set — see calendar section.
Friday Ops meeting minutes + award notifications for week of 5/12. Large Clayco-wide distribution. FYI review.

bucket4.ai_summary: DocuSign COMPLETED — LJC subcontract 109160-001-001. Revised Exhibit B fully executed by all parties. Archive.

Swanson submitted revised Solis waterproofing proposal per 100% DD drawings with updated utility trench scope, material pricing, and interior coating alternate. Subcontract agreement as basis. Needs scope/pricing decision before next GMP update.

bucket5.ai_summary: Dominic Wood (Stantec) sent scheduling poll for Talk Talk coordination call. 2 days no response. Huie OOO — poll likely targeting post-May 20 timeframe. Respond Monday to avoid further delay.
